per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student clearly defines the problem but could improve by directly relating the objectives to minimizing overfitting.
The student identifies a range of relevant concepts and techniques, demonstrating a thorough understanding of model evaluation and overfitting.
The student selects appropriate evaluation metrics and demonstrates an understanding of their strengths and limitations.

justification: The student demonstrates comprehensive understanding of framing by clearly defining the problem, identifying relevant concepts, and selecting appropriate evaluation metrics, with only minor improvements needed in directly relating objectives to minimizing overfitting.
